name: last30days-skill
description: Cluster-first last-30-days research across social, market, and dated web sources, with Gemini 3.1 preview as the default reasoning runtime.

settings.name: Google API Key
settings.description: Required when using Gemini for planning and reranking

settings.name: Serper API Key
settings.description: Optional. Web retrieval fallback when Brave is not configured

settings.name: ScrapeCreators API Key
settings.description: Optional. Enables Reddit, TikTok, and Instagram retrieval

settings.name: xAI API Key
settings.description: Optional xAI reasoning provider and X search backend

settings.name: Reasoning Provider
settings.description: Optional. One of auto, gemini, openai, or xai

settings.name: Planner Model
settings.description: Optional. Must remain a Gemini 3.1 preview model when using Gemini

settings.name: Rerank Model
settings.description: Optional. Must remain a Gemini 3.1 preview model when using Gemini

settings.name: Grounding Model
settings.description: Optional compatibility field. If set, it must remain a Gemini 3.1 preview model

settings.name: X Backend
settings.description: Optional. One of xai or bird

settings.name: Twitter CT0
settings.description: Optional Bird X cookie, pair with AUTH_TOKEN
